publishedAbstract: * MCG returns `INVALID_ENDPOINT` when trying to add a BackingStore with Azure Stack (i.e. local) Endpoint. * In the Noobaa GUI while adding a cloud resource on Azure Blob, and choosing the endpoint of Azure Stack, it gives `Please enter a valid Azure endpoint` error.
publishedTitle: MCG returns 'INVALID_ENDPOINT' when trying to add a BackingStore with Azure Stack Endpoint.
